www.rbi.org.in
RBI/2024-25/126
FMRD.FMD.No.10/14.01.006/2024-25 January 07, 2025

To,
All Authorised Persons
Madam/Sir,
Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Non-resident Investment in Debt
Instruments) Directions, 2025
In exercise of the powers conferred under section 6, read with section 47 of the Foreign
Exchange Management Act, 1999, the Reserve Bank has issued the following
regulations to regulate non-resident investment in debt instruments in India:
a.
enriched_requirements.object: Authorised Persons Madam/Sir, Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Non-resident Investment in Debt Instruments) Directions, 202

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
FEMA 1/2000-RB dated May
03, 2000, as amended from time to time;
enriched_requirements.object: from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
AD Category-I banks may bring the contents of the Master Direction to the notice of
their constituents.
enriched_requirements.object: the Master Direction to the notice of their constituents

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) These Directions shall be called the Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India
(Non-resident Investment in Debt Instruments) Directions, 2025.
enriched_requirements.object: Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Non-resident Investment in Debt Instruments) Directions, 2025

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (ii) These Directions shall be applicable with immediate effect.
enriched_requirements.object: effect

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) These Directions shall be applicable to all transactions by eligible non-residents
in debt instruments.
enriched_requirements.object: transactions by eligible non-residents in debt instruments

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(a) "Corporate debt securities" shall include all instruments specified in sub-
paragraph - A of paragraph 1 of Schedule 1 to Foreign Exchange
Management (Debt Instruments) Regulations, 2019, other than
Government securities and municipal bonds as specified at clause (a) and
clause (k) of that sub-paragraph, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: in sub- paragraph - A of paragraph 1 of Schedule 1 to Foreign Exchange Management (Debt Instruments) Regulations, 20

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(b) "Committed Portfolio Size" (CPS) for a Foreign Portfolio Investor (FPI)
shall mean the amount allotted to that FPI under the Voluntary Retention
Route.
enriched_requirements.object: to that FPI under the Voluntary Retention Route

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(c) "Default bonds" shall mean Non-Convertible Debentures/bonds, which
are under default, either fully or partly, in the repayment of principal on
maturity or principal instalment in the case of amortising bond.
enriched_requirements.object: are under default, either fully or partly, in the repayment of principal on maturity or principal instalm

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(d) "Electronic Trading Platform (ETP)" shall have the same meaning as
assigned to it in Section 2(a)(ii) of Master Direction - Reserve Bank of
India (Electronic Trading Platforms) Directions, 2025 dated June 16, 2025,
as modified from time to time;
enriched_requirements.object: as assigned to it in Section 2(a)(ii) of Master Direction - Reserve Bank of India (Electronic Trading Platforms) Directions, 202

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(e) "Foreign Portfolio Investor (FPI)" shall mean a person registered in
accordance with the provisions of the Securities and Exchange Board of
India (Foreign Portfolio Investors) Regulations, 2019, as amended from
time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: in accordance with the provisions of the Securities and Exchange Board of India (Foreign Portfolio Investors) Regulations, 20

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(f) "Government security" shall mean a security as defined under section
2(f) of the Government Securities Act, 2006.
enriched_requirements.object: defined under section 2(f) of the Government Securities Act, 2006

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(h) "Minor violations" shall mean violations that are, in the considered
opinion of the custodians, unintentional, temporary in nature or have
occurred on account of reasons beyond the control of FPIs, and in all cases
are corrected on detection.
enriched_requirements.object: in the considered opinion of the custodians, unintentional, temporary in nature or have occurred on account of reasons beyon

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) "Multilateral Financial Institution", for the purpose of these Directions,
shall mean an FPI which is a Multilateral Financial Institution in which
Government of India is a member.
enriched_requirements.object: is a Multilateral Financial Institution in which Government of India is a member

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(j) "Non-resident" shall mean a person resident outside India as defined
under section 2(w) of FEMA, 1999.
enriched_requirements.object: outside India as defined under section 2(w) of FEMA, 1999

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ja) "Non-Resident Indian (NRI)" shall mean an individual resident outside
India who is a citizen of India.xxi
enriched_requirements.object: outside India who is a citizen of India

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(k) "Over-the-Counter (OTC) Markets" shall mean markets where
transactions are undertaken in any manner other than on exchanges and
shall include those executed on electronic trading platforms (ETPs).
enriched_requirements.object: are undertaken in any manner other than on exchanges and shall include those executed on electronic trading platforms

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(l) "Person resident outside India" shall have the same meaning as
assigned to it under section 2(w) of FEMA, 1999.
enriched_requirements.object: as assigned to it under section 2(w) of FEMA, 1999

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(m) "Real Estate Business" shall have the same meaning as assigned to it
under the note (6) to item no.
enriched_requirements.object: as assigned to it under the note (6) to item no

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(n) "Recognised stock exchange" shall have the same meaning as
assigned to it in section 2(f) of the Securities Contracts (Regulations) Act,
1956.
enriched_requirements.object: as assigned to it in section 2(f) of the Securities Contracts (Regulations) Act, 1956

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(o) "Related FPIs" shall mean 'investor group' as defined in Regulation 22(3)
of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Foreign Portfolio Investors)
Regulations, 2019.
enriched_requirements.object: defined in Regulation 22(3) of Securities and Exchange Board of India (Foreign Portfolio Investors) Regulations, 2019

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(p) "Repo" shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in Section 45U (c)
of RBI Act, 1934;
enriched_requirements.object: as assigned to it in Section 45U (c) of RBI Act, 1934

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(q) "Retention Period" shall mean the time period that an FPI voluntarily
commits for retaining the CPS in India under the Voluntary Retention
Route.
enriched_requirements.object: that an FPI voluntarily commits for retaining the CPS in India under the Voluntary Retention Route

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(r) "Reverse Repo" shall have the same meaning as assigned to it in Section
45U (d) of RBI Act, 1934;
enriched_requirements.object: as assigned to it in Section 45U (d) of RBI Act, 1934

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(t) "Specified securities" shall mean Central Government securities as
periodically notified by the Reserve Bank for investment under the Fully
Accessible Route.
enriched_requirements.object: as periodically notified by the Reserve Bank for investment under the Fully Accessible Route

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) Words and expressions used but not defined in these Directions, shall have
the meaning assigned to them in FEMA, 1999, and the RBI Act, 1934.
enriched_requirements.object: to them in FEMA, 1999, and the RBI Act, 1934

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) The following shall be the channels for investment in debt instruments by non-
residents:
<image>
enriched_requirements.object: investment in debt instruments by non- residents: <image>

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) Investments by Non-Resident Indians in debt instruments shall be in terms of
instructions stipulated in Part - 5(B) of these Directions.xxii
Part - 2
enriched_requirements.object: instructions stipulated in Part - 5(B) of these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Investment in Government securities shall be in terms of the following:
enriched_requirements.object: the following:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(a) Reinvestment of coupon by FPIs in Central Government securities and
State Government securities shall be reckoned within the limit for
investment stipulated for Central Government securities and State
Government securities, as applicable.
enriched_requirements.object: limit for investment stipulated for Central Government securities and State Government securities, as applicable

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
FPIs may, however, reinvest
coupons without any constraint.
enriched_requirements.object: without any constraint

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(b) FPIs may reinvest the proceeds of any sale/redemption of Central
Government securities and State Government securities within two
working days from the date of sale/redemption (including the date of
sale/redemption) irrespective of the availability of limits in the category.
enriched_requirements.object: any sale/redemption of Central Government securities and State Government securities within two working days from the date of

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Any reinvestment beyond two working days shall be subject to availability
of limits for that category.
enriched_requirements.object: of limits for that category

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(CCIL) shall monitor the utilisation of the
investment limits for FPI investment in Central Government securities and State
Government securities [***] xxxii.
enriched_requirements.object: the investment limits for FPI investment in Central Government securities and State Government securities [***] xxxii

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
CCIL shall disseminate the utilisation levels of
the aforesaid limits.
enriched_requirements.object: of the aforesaid limits

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(vii) The primary responsibility of complying with all applicable limits for investment
in Government securities shall lie with the FPIs and custodians.
enriched_requirements.object: and custodians

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Investment in corporate debt securities shall be in terms of the following:
enriched_requirements.object: the following:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) Minimum residual maturity requirement: An FPI may invest only in corporate
debt securities with original/residual maturity of above one year.
enriched_requirements.object: debt securities with original/residual maturity of above one year

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (ii) An FPI shall not invest in:

and
4 The categorization of debt mutual fund schemes and meaning of the expression 'Macaulay duration of the portfolio' shall be as per the SEBI's Master Circular for Mutual Funds dated June 27, 2024, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: SEBI's Master Circular for Mutual Funds dated June 27, 2024, as amended from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) Issue-wise limit: Investment by any FPI, including investments by related FPIs,
shall not exceed 50 per cent of any issue of a corporate debt security.
enriched_requirements.object: of any issue of a corporate debt security

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
31 dated June 15, 2018, the FPIs shall not make further investments in that issue
until this limit is complied with.
enriched_requirements.object: that issue until this limit is complied with

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(vi) FPI investment in unlisted corporate debt securities in the form of non-convertible
debentures/bonds issued by public or private companies shall be subject to end-
use restrictions on investments in real estate business, capital market and
purchase of land.
enriched_requirements.object: use restrictions on investments in real estate business, capital market and purchase of land

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (vii) An FPI may invest in 'to be listed' corporate debt securities.
enriched_requirements.object: listed' corporate debt securities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the corporate debt
security is not listed within such period prescribed by Securities and Exchange
Board of India (SEBI) for the purpose, the FPI shall immediately sell the corporate
debt security to the issuer or to a third party.
enriched_requirements.object: debt security to the issuer or to a third party

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, the terms of offer
to an FPI investing in such securities shall contain a clause requiring the issuer to
immediately redeem/buyback the corporate debt security in such an eventuality.
enriched_requirements.object: the issuer to immediately redeem/buyback the corporate debt security in such an eventuality

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(a) The minimum residual maturity requirement [***] iii and the issue-wise limit shall
not apply to investments by FPIs in the following securities:
enriched_requirements.object: FPIs in the following securities:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(b) The minimum residual maturity requirement shall not apply to investments by
FPIs in the following securities:
enriched_requirements.object: FPIs in the following securities:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(c) The issue-wise limit shall not apply to investments in corporate debt securities
by multilateral financial institutions.
enriched_requirements.object: corporate debt securities by multilateral financial institutions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ix) An FPI which proposes to acquire default bonds shall disclose to the Debenture
Trustees the terms of its offer to the existing debenture holders / beneficial owners
from whom it is acquiring the bonds.
enriched_requirements.object: Trustees the terms of its offer to the existing debenture holders / beneficial owners from whom it is acquiring the bonds

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(x) Utilization of FPI investment limits in corporate debt securities shall be monitored
by the depositories registered with SEBI in accordance with the applicable
regulations/directions/guidelines issued by SEBI from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: depositories registered with SEBI in accordance with the applicable regulations/directions/guidelines issued by SEBI from time to

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(xi) The primary responsibility of complying with all applicable limits for investment in
corporate debt securities shall lie with the FPIs and custodians.
enriched_requirements.object: and custodians

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
However, investments shall be permitted in ETFs that invest only in debt
instruments.
enriched_requirements.object: that invest only in debt instruments

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(a) FPI investment in unlisted corporate debt securities in the form of non-
convertible debentures/bonds issued by public or private companies shall be
subject to end-use restriction on investment in real estate business, capital
market and purchase of land.
enriched_requirements.object: restriction on investment in real estate business, capital market and purchase of land

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (b) An FPI may invest in 'to be listed' corporate debt securities.
enriched_requirements.object: listed' corporate debt securities

conditions:
If the corporate debt
security is not listed within such period prescribed by SEBI for the purpose
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If the corporate debt
security is not listed within such period prescribed by SEBI for the purpose, the
FPI shall immediately sell the corporate debt security to the issuer or to a third
party.
enriched_requirements.object: debt security to the issuer or to a third party

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose, the terms of offer to an FPI investing in such securities
shall contain a clause requiring the issuer to immediately redeem/buyback the
corporate debt security in such an eventuality.
enriched_requirements.object: the issuer to immediately redeem/buyback the corporate debt security in such an eventuality

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(c) An FPI which proposes to acquire default bonds shall disclose to the Debenture
Trustees the terms of its offer to the existing debenture holders / beneficial
owners from whom it is acquiring the bonds.
enriched_requirements.object: Trustees the terms of its offer to the existing debenture holders / beneficial owners from whom it is acquiring the bonds

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Investment limit: Investments under VRR shall be subject to the investment limit
stipulated for FPI investments under the General Route as specified in paragraph
enriched_requirements.object: investment limit stipulated for FPI investments under the General Route as specified in paragraph

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(a) Allocation of investment amount to FPIs under this Route shall be made on tap
and allotted on a 'first come, first served' basis or through an auction mechanism
as detailed in Annex - 2.
enriched_requirements.object: and allotted on a 'first come, first served' basis or through an auction mechanism as detailed in Annex - 2

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The mode of allotment shall be announced by the
Reserve Bank for each tranche.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank for each tranche

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(b) For allocation of investment amounts on tap, an FPI may apply for investment
limit online to CCIL through their respective custodians.
enriched_requirements.object: online to CCIL through their respective custodians

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(c) The maximum investment limit which can be allotted to an FPI (including its
related FPIs) shall be 50 per cent of the amount offered for each allotment by tap
or through auction, in case of demand for more than 100 per cent of amount
offered.
enriched_requirements.object: of the amount offered for each allotment by tap or through auction, in case of demand for more than 100 per cent of amount offered

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) Retention period: The minimum retention period shall be three years or as
announced by the Reserve Bank for each tranche.
enriched_requirements.object: as announced by the Reserve Bank for each tranche

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The retention period shall
commence from the date of allotment of limit.
enriched_requirements.object: of allotment of limit

conditions:
Provided that for an FPI that has availed additional time to invest in terms of the
A
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Provided that for an FPI that has availed additional time to invest in terms of the
A.P.(DIR Series) Circular No.32 dated May 22, 2020, the retention period for the
investments (committed by it at the time of allotment of investment limit) would be
reset to commence from the date that the FPI invests 75 per cent of the
Committed Portfolio Size (CPS).
enriched_requirements.object: has availed additional time to invest in terms of the A

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) An FPI shall invest at least 75 per cent of its CPS within three months from the
date of allotment and remain invested to a minimum extent of 75 per cent of the
CPS at all times during the committed retention period.
enriched_requirements.object: per cent of its CPS within three months from the date of allotment and remain invested to a minimum extent of 75 per cent of the CP

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
For this purpose,
investment shall include cash holdings in the Rupee accounts used for the VRR.
enriched_requirements.object: the Rupee accounts used for the VRR

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The required investment amount shall be adhered to on an end-of-day basis.
enriched_requirements.object: an end-of-day basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) An FPI may, at its discretion, transfer its investments made under the General
Route, if any, to the VRR.
enriched_requirements.object: transfer its investments made under the General Route

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) Custodians shall not permit any repatriation from the cash accounts of an FPI, if
such transaction leads to the FPI's assets falling below the minimum stipulated
level of 75 per cent of CPS during the retention period.
enriched_requirements.object: the cash accounts of an FPI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) Income from investments through the VRR may be reinvested at the discretion of
the FPI even if such investments are in excess of the CPS.
enriched_requirements.object: discretion of the FPI even if such investments are in excess of the CPS

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(v) Investments made through the VRR shall not be subject to any minimum residual
maturity requirement [***] iv or issue-wise limits applicable to corporate debt
securities as specified for FPI investment under the General Route.
enriched_requirements.object: minimum residual maturity requirement [***] iv or issue-wise limits applicable to corporate debt securities as specified for FPI inv

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (i) An FPI may, at the end of the retention period, opt to:
enriched_requirements.object: of the retention period, opt to:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In such a
case, the FPI shall convey this decision to its custodian before the end of the
committed retention period.
enriched_requirements.object: its custodian before the end of the committed retention period

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: The custodian, in turn, shall report the same to CCIL.
enriched_requirements.object: CCIL

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) An FPI desiring to exit its investments, fully or partly, under the VRR prior to the
end of the retention period may do so by selling its investments to another FPI or
FPIs.
enriched_requirements.object: its investments to another FPI or FPIs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The FPI (or FPIs) buying such investment shall abide by all the terms and
conditions applicable to the selling FPI under the VRR.
enriched_requirements.object: terms and conditions applicable to the selling FPI under the VRR

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) An FPI that had availed investment limit for a retention period exceeding the
minimum retention period stipulated in terms of paragraph 5.3(ii) of these Directions
may opt to liquidate its portfolio fully or partly and exit after the end of the said
minimum retention period.xx
enriched_requirements.object: portfolio fully or partly and exit after the end of the said minimum retention period

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An FPI shall open one or more separate Special Non-Resident Rupee (SNRR)
account(s) for investments through the VRR.
enriched_requirements.object: separate Special Non-Resident Rupee (SNRR) account(s) for investments through the VRR

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
All fund flows relating to investment
through the VRR shall be reflected in such account(s).
enriched_requirements.object: account(s)

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
An FPI may open a
separate security account for holding debt securities under the VRR.
enriched_requirements.object: account for holding debt securities under the VRR

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Utilisation of limits and adherence to other requirements of the VRR shall be the
responsibility of both the FPI and its custodian.
enriched_requirements.object: both the FPI and its custodian

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Custodians shall ensure that
appropriate legal documentation with FPIs are in place to enable the custodians
to ensure that the Directions under the VRR are adhered to.
enriched_requirements.object: documentation with FPIs are in place to enable the custodians to ensure that the Directions under the VRR are adhered to

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Fully Accessible Route
Explanation: "non-convertible debentures/bonds issued by an Indian company" and
"commercial papers issued by an Indian company" shall mean instruments as
specified respectively at paragraph 1A(b) and paragraph 1A(c) of Schedule 1 to
Foreign Exchange Management (Debt Instruments) Regulations, 2019 notified, vide,
Notification No.
enriched_requirements.object: respectively at paragraph 1A(b) and paragraph 1A(c) of Schedule 1 to Foreign Exchange Management (Debt Instruments) Regu

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Investments in 'specified securities' included under the FAR shall be in terms of
the same stipulations prescribed for FPIs in paragraph 6.3 of these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: the same stipulations prescribed for FPIs in paragraph 6

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Investments in Central Government securities (including Treasury Bills) other
than the 'specified securities' included under the FAR shall be in terms of the following:
enriched_requirements.object: the following:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) Any other person resident outside India, as may be notified by the Reserve Bank
from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: Reserve Bank from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
and any other security that the Reserve Bank may notify in this
regard.xxxiii

(ii) The Reserve Bank may add new tenors or change the tenors of new securities
to be designated as 'specified securities' from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: change the tenors of new securities to be designated as 'specified securities' from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) 'Specified securities', once so designated, shall remain eligible for investment
under the FAR until maturity.
enriched_requirements.object: under the FAR until maturity

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
FPI investment in "specified securities" under this Route shall not be subject to
any investment limit or macro-prudential controls as applicable for investments in
Government securities through the General Route.
enriched_requirements.object: investment limit or macro-prudential controls as applicable for investments in Government securities through the General Route

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Investments in Sovereign Green Bonds issued by the Government of India
may be made by eligible investors in the International Financial Services Centre in
India.
enriched_requirements.object: investors in the International Financial Services Centre in India

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such investment shall be in terms of the 'Scheme for Trading and Settlement
of Sovereign Green Bonds in the International Financial Services Centre in India',
notified by the Reserve Bank, vide CO.FMRD.FMIA.No.S242/11-01-051/2024-2025
dated August 29, 2024, as amended from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: the 'Scheme for Trading and Settlement of Sovereign Green Bonds in the International Financial Services Centre in India', notified by t

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Provided that the minimum residual maturity requirement as set out in paragraph
enriched_requirements.object: requirement as set out in paragraph

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
4.4 (i) and the issue-wise limit as set out in paragraph 4.4 (iv) of these Directions
shall not apply to investments made under the SRVA route.
enriched_requirements.object: under the SRVA route

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) The primary responsibility of complying with all applicable limits for such
investments shall lie with the SRVA holders and the AD Category - I banks where
these accounts are maintained.xiii
7A.5.
enriched_requirements.object: holders and the AD Category - I banks where these accounts are maintained

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The amount of consideration for purchase of eligible instrumentsxiv shall be paid
out of the rupee surplus balance held in the SRVA and all sale/maturity proceeds and
interest payments shall be credited to the same account.
enriched_requirements.object: the rupee surplus balance held in the SRVA and all sale/maturity proceeds and interest payments shall be credited to the same account
AD Category - I banks only for persons that maintain SRVAs with them

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) furnish any report/information relating to these transactions in such format and
within such timelines as the Reserve Bank may prescribe;

Investments by Non-Resident Indians in debt instruments
Non-Resident Indians may invest in debt instruments as specified in sub-paragraphs
enriched_requirements.object: as specified in sub-paragraphs

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such investments shall not be subject to any
investment limit under these Directions.
enriched_requirements.object: investment limit under these Directions

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Other Facilities
A non-resident may undertake transactions in foreign exchange, interest rate and
credit derivatives in terms of the following Directions:
enriched_requirements.object: exchange, interest rate and credit derivatives in terms of the following Directions:

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) An FPI may participate in the Government securities market, both primary and
secondary.
enriched_requirements.object: securities market, both primary and secondary

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(ii) An FPI may trade in the secondary market for Government securities through the
primary members of NDS-OM, including by using the NDS-OM Web module.
enriched_requirements.object: market for Government securities through the primary members of NDS-OM, including by using the NDS-OM Web module

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iii) Payment of margin for transaction in Government securities: AD Cat-I
Banks may lend to FPIs in accordance with their credit risk management
frameworks for the purpose of placing margins with CCIL for the settlement of
Government securities transactions by FPIs.
enriched_requirements.object: accordance with their credit risk management frameworks for the purpose of placing margins with CCIL for the settlement of Government

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(iv) Reporting of transactions in Government securities: All OTC trades in
Government securities undertaken by FPIs (except transactions undertaken
using the NDS-OM web module) shall be reported to the NDS-OM platform on
the trade date within three hours after the close of trading hours for the
Government securities market and in accordance with the operational guidance
issued by Clearcorp Dealing Systems (India) Ltd in this regard.
enriched_requirements.object: NDS-OM platform on the trade date within three hours after the close of trading hours for the Government securities market and in a

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Obligation to provide information sought by the Reserve Bank
The Reserve Bank may call for information or statement or seek any clarification,
which in the opinion of the Reserve Bank is relevant, from non-residents, custodians,
or any other entity involved with non-resident investment in debt instruments.
enriched_requirements.object: statement or seek any clarification, which in the opinion of the Reserve Bank is relevant, from non-residents, custodians, or

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Such
persons, agencies and participants shall furnish such information, statement or
clarification within such time, and in the manner, as specified by the Reserve Bank,
from time to time.
enriched_requirements.object: or clarification within such time, and in the manner, as specified by the Reserve Bank, from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Dissemination of data
The Reserve Bank or any other person authorised by the Reserve Bank, may publish
any anonymised data related to transactions by non-residents in debt instruments.
enriched_requirements.object: related to transactions by non-residents in debt instruments

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
(i) Any transaction in breach of applicable investment limit or macro-prudential
control shall not be accepted.

Any transaction/investment in breach of applicable
investment limit shall need to be reversed.
(ii) Any violation by FPIs shall be subject to regulatory action as determined by SEBI.
enriched_requirements.object: action as determined by SEBI

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Custodians shall report to SEBI all violations
that do not fall within the ambit of minor violations as well as minor violations that
have not been regularised within the time period permitted as above.
enriched_requirements.object: violations that do not fall within the ambit of minor violations as well as minor violations that have not been regularised within

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Investments by eligible investors under these Directions shall be governed by all
other applicable provisions of FEMA, 1999, and the rules, regulations and
directions issued thereunder by the Reserve Bank from time to time, unless
otherwise specified.
enriched_requirements.object: other applicable provisions of FEMA, 1999, and the rules, regulations and directions issued thereunder by the Reserve Bank from time to time

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: (DIR Series) Circular No.05 dated May 31, 2021

FMRD.FMD.No.01/14.01.006/2025-26 dated May 08, 2025
ii
<image>

Annex - 2
Auction process for allocation of investment amount under VRR
The auction process for allotment of investment amounts under the VRR shall be as
under:
a.

An FPI shall bid two variables - the amount it proposes to invest and the
retention period of that investment, which shall not be less than the minimum
retention period applicable for that auction.
enriched_requirements.object: minimum retention period applicable for that auction

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The criterion for allocation under each auction shall be the retention period bid
in the auction.
enriched_requirements.object: bid in the auction

conditions:
in case the
amount bid at margin is more than the amount available for allotment
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Allotment at margin (i.e., at the lowest retention period accepted), in case the
amount bid at margin is more than the amount available for allotment, shall be
as below:
i.

The marginal bid shall be allocated partially such that the total
acceptance amount matches the auction amount.
enriched_requirements.object: that the total acceptance amount matches the auction amount

conditions: In case there are more than one marginal bids
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
In case there are more than one marginal bids, allocation shall be made
to the bid with the largest amount, and then in descending order of
amount bid until the acceptance amount matches the auction amount.
enriched_requirements.object: bid with the largest amount, and then in descending order of amount bid until the acceptance amount matches the auction amount

conditions: If an FPI has been allotted multiple bids in an auction
enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
If an FPI has been allotted multiple bids in an auction, the CPS shall be
reckoned for each bid separately.
enriched_requirements.object: bid separately

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
Before the repeal
the clause read as under:
"Short-term investment limit: Investments by an FPI in corporate debt
securities with residual maturity up to one year shall not exceed 30 per cent of
the total investment of the FPI in corporate debt securities.
enriched_requirements.object: of the total investment of the FPI in corporate debt securities

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The short-term
investment limit shall apply on investments on an end-of-day basis.
enriched_requirements.object: an end-of-day basis

enriched_requirements.full_sentence: Provided that the limit shall not apply:

Before the repeal
the clause read as under:
"Concentration limit: Investment in corporate debt securities by an FPI
(including its related FPIs) shall not exceed 15 per cent of prevailing investment
limit for these securities in case of long-term FPIs and 10 per cent of prevailing
investment limit for other FPIs."
iii.

Before

"Security-wise limit: FPI investment, in aggregate, in any Central Government
security shall not exceed 30 per cent of the outstanding stock of the security."
ix.

enriched_requirements.full_sentence:
The
investment limit may be released in one or more tranches."
Accompanying footnote no.5, accordingly, omitted.
